title: PlanDocument
description: Markdown-backed plan artifact produced during Plan Mode. Authoritative scope for Direct Execution. Every write attempt in execute mode is verified against this document's affected_files.

task_id.description: Stable identifier, used as the markdown filename stem under specs/fixtures/refactor-plans/.

summary.description: One-paragraph human summary of the refactor.

affected_files.description: Repo-relative paths the refactor is authorized to modify. Authoritative for scope-change detection (FR-004, SC-004).

risks.description: Identified risks; may be empty but the field is required (FR-003).

migration_steps.description: Ordered migration steps; at least one is required (FR-003).

out_of_scope.description: Explicitly excluded items. Nullable list — not defaulted to empty string.

open_questions.description: Open questions the human must answer before approval.
